prompts.name: Top-5 Tech last 24h
prompts.prompt: Summarize the most important technology news from the last 24 hours in 10 bullet points, each with a source link.

prompts.name: Portugal AIMA, SEF, immigration, nomads last 24h
prompts.prompt: Summarize the most important news from Portugal about changes in AIMA, SEF, temporary protection for Ukrainians, digital nomads visas from the last 24 hours in 10 bullet points, each with a source link, in english.
